summary: Tested Live Selfie Verification feature fixes. Backend API tests (8/8 passed) verify /api/minting/photo/{mint_id}/authenticity-status and /api/minting/photo/{mint_id}/selfie-match endpoints. Frontend UI testing confirmed: 1) Modal opens correctly from minted photo card, 2) Attempts counter displays 'Attempts: 3/3 (FREE)' format correctly, 3) Face detection threshold lowered to 0.3 (was 0.5), 4) Bottom navigation hides when modal opens via NavContext, 5) Camera view shows proper UI elements.

issues: Initial confirmation shows 'Cost: 100 BL per attempt' which may confuse users since first 3 attempts are FREE. Consider updating to 'First 3 attempts FREE, then 100 BL each'

critical_code_review_comments: SelfieMatchModal.jsx: Correctly implements NavContext to hide bottom navigation during selfie flow
faceDetection.js: scoreThreshold lowered from 0.5 to 0.3 for default detection, 0.2 for real-time preview - more lenient as required
Attempts counter correctly shows 'Attempts: X/3 (FREE)' format in camera view
Backend minting_routes.py: Attempts only incremented after successful AI analysis, not on client errors
seed_data_creation: Used existing test photo 'Ocean Sunset' (mint_id: mint_test_a1d75b2038d747fe) with has_face=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: Selfie verification feature tested and working. Face detection threshold lowered to 0.3. Attempts counter shows correct format. Bottom nav hides during selfie flow. Camera permission request works (shows 'No camera found' in headless browser which is expected). The actual face matching uses GPT-4o Vision on backend.

selfie_modal_opens.details: Modal opens from 'Face Match (+5%)' button on flipped photo card

attempts_counter_format.details: Shows 'Attempts: 3/3 (FREE)' format correctly in camera view

bottom_nav_hidden.details: NavContext.setHideNav(true) called when modal opens, setHideNav(false) on cleanup

backend_selfie_match.details: Validates input, requires auth, returns 400 for empty selfie data

camera_error_handling.details: Shows 'No camera found on this device' with Retry button in headless browser

note: Camera testing limited in headless browser environment. Real device testing recommended for full camera/face detection verification. The client-side face detection is just a UX helper - actual matching is done by GPT-4o Vision on backend.
